subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! God willing, mayest thou become detached from creation and its conditions, and remain forever fixed upon His truth and His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من انشاء الله از خلق و شئونات او منقطع شوی و لازال بحق و آیات او ناظر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
